diff: T045 adds run_generative_handoff adapter execution in scripts/pipeline_driver.py and unit tests in tests/unit/test_pipeline_driver.py; generative main path now routes through adapter and captures generated artifact metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Generative route executes through explicit handoff adapter rather than placeholder-only return.
Adapter path captures generated artifact metadata for downstream validation.

test_runs.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run pyright scripts/pipeline_driver.py tests/unit/test_pipeline_driver.py

known_risks: Default no-runner mode remains backward-compatible and does not yet enforce artifact validation/event append (covered by T046/T047).
